issues.comment: The spawned reader thread is never saved to a variable nor .join()'d before the assertion. After deletedAll.set(true), the main thread immediately asserts caughtExceptions is empty, but the reader thread may still be processing its last HTTP request. If that in-flight request fails, the exception is added to caughtExceptions after the assertion has already passed, producing a false positive. The fix is to save the Thread to a variable, call .join() after deletedAll.set(true), then assert.
